AgAsset Corporate Presentation
01
AGASSET
HomeCompanyAbout Us

OUR
COMPANY

AgAssetCo is a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) designed to: • Finance productive equipment portfolios • Aggregate distributed demand • Structure vendor-backed financing • De-risk energy project utilization • Provide long-term asset management

02Structure
AGASSET — 2025

Structure

Built for Institutional Scale

Energy developers build power systems. SMEs operate businesses. AgAssetCo finances and manages the productive assets between them.

InfrastructureFinancingOperations
Originator
Agronomie
Asset Vehicle
AgAsset Co
Beneficiary
End User
Telemetry
Predictive
Remote Lock
Load Control
03 OPERATIONS

Beyond Financing — Full Asset Governance

Financing without management leads to asset decay. We integrate financing with structured oversight.

Centralized Monitoring

Remote oversight via global satellite telemetry.

IoT Lifecycle Management

Digital integration for predictive maintenance.

Rapid Response Teams

Localized implementation for physical repairs.

04Principles
AGASSET — 2025

Our Mission
Converting Electrons into
Enterprise

To institutionalize Productive Use of Energy through structured asset financing and disciplined portfolio management.

The Long View

Our Vision

A distributed energy ecosystem where every installed kilowatt is matched with productive industrial load.

Our Model

Vendor Financing & Asset-as-a-Service

We replace heavy upfront capital expenditure with structured financing mechanisms:

#CAPEX#OPEX#SCALE

TRUSTED BY GLOBAL INSTITUTIONS & INFRASTRUCTURE LEADERS

REAAgronomiePower AfricaShell FoundationWorld BankIFC

Align Your Capital with
Impact.

By choosing renewable energy financing, you lower energy costs, reduce carbon emissions, and support innovative solutions that benefit our planet. Whether you are a mini-grid developer seeking utilization or an investor seeking impact, we have the vehicle to execute.

Corporate Resources.
